title: Warren Buffett Cautions Against Stock Market ‘Casino' As Charlie Munger Slams Robinhood
text: Buffett and his right-hand man had harsh words for Wall Street at Berkshire Hathaway's annual shareholder meeting.

title: Munger says retail trading firm Robinhood getting comeuppance
text: Berkshire Hathaway's vice-chairman Charles Munger said on Saturday that retail broker Robinhood Markets Inc, which is trading near a record low, was getting its comeuppance.

title: 'God is getting just' as Robinhood app unravels, says Charlie Munger
text: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. BRK.A, -2.94% BRK.B, -2.55% Vice Chairman Charlie Munger on Saturday said the Robinhood trading app was "unraveling" after engaging in practices he labeled "disgusting." "Look what happened to Robinhood from its peak to its trough," Munger said at Berkshire's annual meeting.

text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ: HOOD) rallied more than 6% into its first-quarter earnings print but the trading platform's results caused the stock to plummet to a new all-time low of $8.77 at 5:45 p.m. in after-hours trading on Thursday.

title: Robinhood shares are down 12% in premarket: what happened
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ: HOOD) shares are down 12% in premarket trading on Friday after the fintech company reported weaker-than-expected results for its fiscal Q1 as macroeconomic headwinds weighed on trading volume. Robinhood Q1 earnings snapshot Lost $392 million versus the year-ago figure of $1.40 billion.

title: Robinhood Markets stock slumps as smaller retail trades drop out
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) shares slumped at the end of a whip-saw Thursday after first-quarter results as 2022's spiking volatility and stock market sell-offs smashed retail trading volumes. It also remains to be seen whether soaring inflation and the cost of living crisis will shutdown the so-called ‘small dollar' retail trading phenomena that propelled the stock and crypto app during the pandemic and 2021.

title: Robinhood Markets' (HOOD) CEO Vlad Tenev on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 28, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Irvin Sha – Head-Investor Relations and Capital Markets Vlad Tenev – Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder Jason Warnick – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Devin Ryan – JMP Securities Ken Worthington – JPMorgan Rich Repetto – Piper Sandler Will Nance – Goldman Sachs Eli Molin – Bank of America Michael Anagnostakis – Wolfe Research Trevor Young – Barclays Josh Beck – KeyBanc Operator Thank you for standing by and welcome to Robinhood's First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Robinhood Q1: Fewer Retail Investors With Lower Account Balances Trading Less
text: The difficult macroeconomic climate is causing smaller investors to pull back from trading, Robinhood CEO and co-founder Vlad Tenev said Thursday (April 28) during the company's quarterly earnings call.  During the quarter ended March 31, the company saw decreases in trading volumes, monthly active users and assets under custody.

title: Robinhood lays off 9% of its staff

title: After Spurt of Pandemic-Driven Hiring, Robinhood Cuts 9% of Full-Time Staff
text: Stock brokerage app Robinhood has said it's laying off 9% of its full-time employees, according to a company blog post published Tuesday (April 26). title: Robinhood coming to UK after agreeing to acquire crypto firm Ziglu
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD), the controversial US retail trading platform , said it has agreed to acquire digital currency platform Ziglu. The London-based platform will provide Robinhood with a Financial Conduct Authority (FCA)-regulated arm in the UK.

title: Robinhood: It's Time To Dive In For The Long Haul
text: Shares of Robinhood have been in a consistent downtrend since its IPO, and have lost 40% year-to-date. Slower trading activity driven by this year's correction has been a major headwind, though equity revenue declines have been offset by relatively stable options and crypto activity.

title: Robinhood Markets, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2022 Results on April 28, 2022
text: MENLO PARK, Calif., April 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) announced that it will release its first quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, April 28, 2022 after market close. An earnings conference call will be held at 2:00 PM PT/5:00 PM ET on the same day. A live webcast of the call and supporting materials will be available at investors.robinhood.com. Following the call, a replay and transcript will also be available on the same website.
